overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character in traditional armor walking through a golden autumn landscape. The character engages in brief combat with two enemies, passes wooden training dummies, and ascends to a cliff overlook with panoramic mountain views.

scene_state.functional_zone: open training ground with autumn maple trees

events.description: samurai engages and defeats two enemy swordsmen near the large maple tree

agents.ego_description: approaching two enemy combatants and engaging them in melee combat with sword strikes

second enemy combatant engaging in combat

row of wooden T-shaped practice targets
hazy mountains visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks through tall golden grass toward two enemy combatants near a large maple tree. After a brief combat encounter defeating both enemies, the character continues past the tree as autumn leaves fall around the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: training field with wooden practice dummies

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past the line of wooden training dummies arranged in the field

wooden practice post with crossbar arms
wooden practice post with crossbar arms

segments.scene_description: The character moves through an open field lined with wooden training dummies, passing each post in sequence. The large maple tree falls behind as the path continues through the golden grass.

events.description: character begins ascending rocky terrain toward cliff edge

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rocky hillside path toward the cliff overlook

entered.detail: light-colored rock formation with vertical striations

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to rocky ground as the character ascends a hillside toward a cliff edge. The training dummies are left behind as the path climbs higher, revealing more of the distant mountain range.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff top overlook with panoramic mountain view

events.description: character stops at cliff edge and begins observing the landscape

agents.ego_description: standing at the cliff edge while the camera pans to showcase the panoramic valley and mountain views

entered.detail: tall mountain peak with white snow cap visible against the sky
blue river winding through the forested valley below
dense autumn-colored forest covering the valley floor

segments.scene_description: At the cliff's edge, the character stands still as the camera pans across a breathtaking panoramic view. Snow-capped mountains rise in the distance above a valley filled with autumn forests and a winding river, while leaves drift on the wind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a golden autumn forest through a training ground and up to a high mountain overlook. It begins with a samurai walking through tall golden grass to engage two enemies near a large maple tree, continuing forward as autumn leaves drift through the air. As the character moves away from the tree, the scene opens into a field lined with wooden training dummies that the camera passes in sequence. The terrain then shifts from soft grass to rocky ground as the character ascends a hillside, leaving the training posts behind while the horizon gradually expands. Finally, the camera reaches the cliff's edge and pans across a breathtaking panoramic view of snow-capped mountains and a winding river cutting through a valley of autumn forests.
